Common.tagline: Track and accept crypto payments. Privacy oriented. Wallet to wallet.

HomePage.metaDescription: Non-custodial crypto payments directly to your wallet. Privacy friendly checkout. Set up in minutes.
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Privacy oriented. Wallet to wallet. Set up in minutes.
HomePage.heroBody: Receive crypto payments from your store or app directly to your wallet. We do not custody your funds — you keep full control.
HomePage.highlightsTitle: Built like the gateways merchants already trust

nonCustodial.title: Non custodial
nonCustodial.description: Payments go directly to your wallet.

privacyFriendly.title: Privacy friendly
privacyFriendly.description: Checkout stays on your site. We track status — we do not hold balances.

quickSetup.title: Quick setup
quickSetup.description: Connect a wallet and create your first payment link in minutes.

HomePage.whatYouGetDescription: Payment links, invoices, and a unified API — fast, reliable, and under your control.
HomePage.integrationsDescription: Use payment links for quick invoices, embed checkout on your site, or integrate with our developer API and webhooks.
HomePage.apiTitle: One-stop API for BTC, ETH, USDT & more
HomePage.apiDescription: Full control with the Crypto Pay API. Clear documentation, webhooks, and support for custom checkout flows.
HomePage.getStartedDescription: Join now to access payment technology that delivers smooth, quick checkout experiences for your customers.

1.title: Connect your wallet
1.description: Add the public address where you want to receive payments. No private keys required.

2.title: Create a payment request
2.description: Set amount, coin, and reference. Share a link or call the API from your backend.

3.title: Track on-chain confirmation
3.description: We detect the transaction and update status from unpaid → in process → paid.

directSettlement.title: Wallet to wallet
directSettlement.description: Funds never sit in a pooled merchant account. Settlement is direct to your wallet.

noChargebacks.title: No chargebacks
noChargebacks.description: On-chain payments are final once confirmed — no card-style reversals.

limitedKyc.title: Limited KYC
limitedKyc.description: We do not process or store payments. Requirements depend on risk assessment, not custody.

unifiedApi.title: Unified API
unifiedApi.description: One integration for payment links, charges, status, and webhook callbacks.

dashboard.subtitle: Set up payout wallets for your business. Payment links and checkout are coming next.
dashboard.developersDescription: Docs for charges, webhooks, and custom checkout

setup.title: Getting started
setup.description: Complete these steps before accepting crypto payments on your site.
setup.step1Description: Paste a public address you control. We never ask for private keys.
setup.step2Description: Each new address is reviewed before it can receive payouts.
setup.step2DescriptionPending: Your wallet is pending — we emailed our team. Use Resend on the Wallets tab if needed.
setup.step3Description: Payment links, charge API, and on-chain confirmation webhooks are in development.

activity.title: Payment activity
activity.description: On-chain payments and settlement status will appear here after checkout launches.
activity.emptyDetail: Nothing to show yet — this is not a transaction feed. Once charges are live, you will see unpaid, in-process, and paid events like other crypto merchant tools.

charges.title: Payment links & charges
charges.description: Create a request with amount, coin, and order reference.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: HTTPS callbacks when a payment confirms on-chain.

wallets.title: Payout wallets
wallets.description: Named payout addresses for your business. Each address is verified by our team before it can be used for settlement.

stats.verifiedHint: Ready for payout routing when payments go live
stats.pendingHint: Waiting for Crypto Pay admin verification

wallets.listHint: Save sends the address for admin review. You will get email when it is approved or rejected.
wallets.emptyState: No wallets yet. Add your first payout address to get started.

dialog.description: Name your wallet (e.g. Main BTC, Online sales). Each save is sent for admin verification.

messages.duplicateName: You already have a wallet with this name.
messages.updateFailed: Could not update wallet. Try again.
messages.saveFailed: Could not save wallet. Try again.
messages.savedPending: Wallet saved as pending verification. Our team will review it shortly.
messages.resendOnlyPending: Only pending wallets can request a new review email.
messages.resendCooldown: A reminder was already sent in the last 24 hours. Please wait or contact support if urgent.
messages.requestUpdateFailed: Could not update request. Try again.
messages.reminderFailed: Reminder could not be sent right now. Your wallet is still pending review.
messages.reminderSent: Verification reminder sent to Crypto Pay admin. Status remains pending until approved.
messages.deleteOnlyPending: Only pending wallets can be removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account preferences and notification settings
settings.languageHint: Applies to the whole site. Your choice is saved in your account and remembered on your next visit.
settings.walletUpdatesHint: Verification results and payment status (when checkout is live)
settings.marketingEmailsHint: News about Crypto Pay features and pricing

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage your account security, authentication methods, and privacy settings
security.passwordUpdateHint: Update your password to keep your account secure
security.passwordSetHint: Set a password for your account for added security
security.twoFactorHint: Add an extra layer of security with 2FA
security.connectedAccountsHint: Manage your connected social and OAuth accounts
security.connectSocialHint: Connect social accounts for easier sign-in
security.activeSessionsHint: View and manage your active login sessions
security.dangerZoneHint: Irreversible actions that permanently affect your account. Proceed with caution.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.
password.strengthHint: Use at least 8 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols

twoFactor.enabledHint: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication
twoFactor.disabledHint: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactor.info: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security by requiring a verification code from your authenticator app in addition to your password.

mfa.title: Enable two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a verification code in addition to your password.
mfa.needApp: An authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.)
mfa.stepScan: Scan a QR code with your authenticator app
mfa.stepEnter: Enter the 6-digit code from the app
mfa.stepLogin: Use the code each time you log in
mfa.scanDescription: Use your authenticator app to scan this QR code, then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
mfa.manualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:
mfa.completeDescription: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.
mfa.completeHint: You'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app each time you log in.

Pricing.metaDescription: Straightforward pricing for businesses accepting crypto payments.
Pricing.ogDescription: Straightforward pricing for businesses accepting crypto payments. Direct wallet settlement included.
Pricing.title: Simple pricing for serious teams
Pricing.description: Start quickly with transparent transaction pricing, then move to custom commercial terms as your volume scales.
Pricing.multiLocationDescription: Contact us for volume pricing and rollout planning.

dashboard.title: Operations overview
dashboard.subtitle: Review payout wallets, merchants, and inbound leads.

merchants.title: Merchants
merchants.description: Accounts from Supabase — manage payout wallet requests and email merchants via Resend.
merchants.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or company…
merchants.accountToolsHint: Auth emails and security actions are sent through Resend with links from Supabase.
merchants.supabaseToolsDescription: Auth Admin API (service role) plus Resend for merchant communications.
merchants.profileSectionHint: Contact details shown in admin and merchant emails.
merchants.accountSectionHint: Sign-in and lead activity from Supabase.
merchants.walletsSectionDescription: Each merchant can register multiple payout addresses. Expand a wallet to review, approve, or email the merchant.
merchants.walletsAccordionHint: {count, plural, one {# wallet} other {# wallets}} · {pending, plural, =0 {none pending} one {# pending review} other {# pending review}}
merchants.verificationSentHint: Merchant and admin inboxes notified when configured.

Auth.verifyEmailWith: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Please verify your email, then sign in.
Auth.verifyEmailGeneric: We sent a confirmation email. Please verify your email, then sign in.
Auth.signInToDashboard: Sign in to continue to your dashboard.
Auth.signedInHint: Go to your dashboard or sign out to switch accounts.
Auth.signedInCreateNew: You're currently signed in. If you want to create a new account with a different email, please
Auth.newHereHint: Create your account with your email and password to get started.
Auth.termsFooter: By continuing, you agree to our
Auth.securityCheckHint: Quick check powered by Cloudflare — completes in a second.
Auth.securityCheckRetry: Please complete the check again, then submit.
Auth.securityCheckRequired: Please complete the security check before continuing.
Auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for Crypto Pay — non-custodial crypto payment acceptance, merchant accounts, and API use.
terms.openGraphDescription: Merchant terms for accepting cryptocurrency payments with wallet-to-wallet settlement.
terms.footerNote: By using Crypto Pay, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: How Crypto Pay collects, uses, and protects merchant and transaction data for crypto payment services.
privacy.openGraphDescription: Privacy practices for merchants using Crypto Pay to accept and track cryptocurrency payments.
privacy.footerNote: This Privacy Policy describes how we handle information when you use Crypto Pay.
